name: mcp-vcd

metadata.name: mcp-vcd
metadata.summary: A model context protocol (MCP) server for value change dump (VCD) waveforms.

documentation:
# mcp-vcd

A model context protocol (MCP) server for value change dump (VCD) waveforms.

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/9d1a6a64-de22-4b5a-a597-685c663c9c79

# Tools

- `get-signal`: Provide all changes of the specified signal name to the model's context. This is useful for large waveform files with many signals where you cannot fit the entire VCD file into the model's context window.

# Installation

Add the following to your `claude_desktop_config.json`:

```json
"mcpServers": {
  "mcp-vcd": {
    "command": "uv",
    "args": [
      "run",
      "mcp-vcd"
    ]
  }
}
```
See [Anthropic's MCP documentation](https://modelcontextprotocol.io/quickstart/user) for more info.

functions.name: mcp_vcd.server.parse_signal_mappings
documentation: Parse VCD file to extract signal name to character mappings.

functions.name: mcp_vcd.server.get_signal_lines
documentation: Get all lines containing the specified character.

functions.name: mcp_vcd.server.handle_list_tools
documentation:
List available tools.
Each tool specifies its arguments using JSON Schema validation.

functions.name: mcp_vcd.server.handle_call_tool
documentation:
Handle tool execution requests.
Tools can analyze VCD files and return signal information.

functions.name: mcp_vcd.main
documentation: Main entry point for the package.
